productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Stripes Navy Blue  Polo Tshirt
description: Composition Navy blue and pink striped T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a polo neck, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, chest button placket, embroidered and appliqued branding on the left chest and vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with similar colours Tumble dry low Medium iron; do not iron on decorations Radiate charm and style in this trendy T-shirt from US Polo. The stripes and the vibrant colours are an eye-catcher, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you comfortable all day long. Keep the top button undone for an easy-going, casual look. Team this with jeans or layer it under a cardigan for instant throw-on-and-go style. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6', shoulders 18"
